title: Grab entrypoint from image
body:
Is there any way I can grab the image entrypoint with skopeo?
I don't see that parameter in the output of `skopeo inspect`

If that's not implemented yet, I'd greatly appreciate some pointers on where I could start looking for adding this change. I'm happy to submit a PR.

Thanks!

comments.body: Nvm, looks like `skopeo inspect --config` does the trick.
